title: Indulgent Rich Turkish Eggplant Imam Bayildi
description: A rich and dense Turkish dish featuring minced garlic and render fat, perfect for a special occasion. This ayurvedic tamasic friendly dish is sure to satisfy your cravings.

ingredients.name: eggplant
ingredients.notes: preferably black beauty or similar variety

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the eggplants in half lengthwise and scoop out the flesh, leaving a shell about 1/4 inch thick.
Chop the eggplant flesh and set it aside.
In a large skillet, heat the rendered lamb fat over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped eggplant flesh, tomato paste, salt, black pepper, and paprika to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stuff each eggplant shell with the eggplant and onion mixture and place them in a baking dish.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, until the eggplants are tender and the filling is heated through.
